sheratonHsinchu.hotelTOS:
Booking Process & Guidelines
 • Once the UTFG receives your booking request, it will be forwarded to the hotel for payment processing. The hotel will contact you via email, so please ensure your email is valid and check your spam folder.
 • This special booking is only available through online reservations. Phone or other booking methods are not accepted.
 • You must complete registering for UTFG School Carnival before booking the hotel.
 • Each participant can book only one room. Multiple bookings are not allowed.
 • Booking implies agreeing with the UTFG event booking regulations. UTFG official announcements take precedence, and the standard individual booking contract under the Tourism Administration does not apply here.
 • The hotel will charge the full payment for the room upon reservation. Please complete the payment within the specified time after receiving the hotel's confirmation.
 • UTFG's special room rates are not eligible for the Marriott Bonvoy Program and do not include an invoice.

Booking Period & Phases

Phase 1 Booking
 • Opening Time: Tuesday, April 15th, 2025, 21:00[GMT+8]
 • Only available for 3-night stay booking (Check in - Friday, July 18th, 2025 | Check out - Monday, July 21st, 2025)
 • Phase 2 will only be available depending on the booking status of Phase 1
 • Once fully booked, a waiting list form will be available

Phase 2 Booking (If available)
 • No restriction on the number of nights, phase 2 booking dates will be announced separately.
 • If all rooms are booked in Phase 1, Phase will not be open.

Cancellation & Refund Policy
 • To cancel a reservation, contact the hotel before Saturday, May 31st, 23:59[GMT+8] to request a refund.
 • Cancellations after June 1st 00:00[GMT+8] will not be refundable.

Hotel Guidelines & Policies
 • Check in: After 16:00 | Check out: Before 11:00
 • Breakfast is provided according to the number of registered accommodation guests per room and will be served at 2F east wing from 06:00~10:00 (Feast -Buffet and All Day Dining)
 • During Peak occupancy, breakfast will be split into two sessions: Session 1: 06:00 - 08:30 / Session 2: 08:30 - 10:00 *Dining time is limited to 1 hour and cannot overlap between sessions.
 • Guests booking with UTFG special room offers will receive exclusive UTFG booking memorabilia.
 • Smoking is prohibited throughout the hotel. Designated smoking areas are available at the 3F negative pressure smoking room and 1F outdoor smoking area. Violators will be charged with a NT$10,000 for cleaning fees.
 • Pets are not allowed (except for guide dogs.) Violators will be charged NT$10,000 for cleaning fees and may face further liability.
 • Free parking is available (height limit: 2m) on a first come, first served basis. Reservations are not available.
 • Free access to the gym (24 hours, for guests aged 16 and above), indoor heated pool (09:00 - 22:00), and spa/sauna (06:00 - 22:00, for guests aged 16 and above).
 • The hotel does not provide disposable amenities (toothbrush, razor, shower cap, etc.). Please bring your own if you need it.
 
In-Room Personal Expenses
 • Guests are responsible for additional expenses such as laundry services, telephone calls, minibar charges, etc., and must settle these upon checkout.

Booking Support
 • For any booking-related inquiries, please contact sales@sheraton-hsinchu.com for assistance.

If you have further questions, please reach out via the official UTFG Facebook Page or email utfgtw@gmail.com.

completed.reminderForHotelNotification: The hotel is expected to send out relevant notifications between April 21 and April 25. Please keep an eye out for a confirmation email from the Sheraton Hotel.
